companyAnnouncements: Let's get shipping like a fox !

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|json|jsonc|css)$"; then ./tools/biome/node_modules/.bin/biome check --write --enforce-assist=true --config-path biome.json "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi'
